title: User Guides - Onboarding screens
scenario: Verify that onboarding screens can be accessed from App Settings > User Guides and that navigating through all onboarding screens displays correct content.
steps: Open the app and go to App Settings.
Tap on the onboarding screens option.
Swipe or navigate through all onboarding screens.
Observe the content displayed on each screen.
expected: All onboarding screens are accessible from App Settings > User Guides, and navigating through each screen displays the correct content as designed.
